options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <net>* # Specify the net name ((net)*, optional)

options.name: -allDefClock
options.description: Selects all nets that have a DEF attribute + USE CLOCK

options.name: -nonDefaultRule
options.description: Select all nets that have a DEF attribute + USE NONDEFAULTRULE

options.name: -shield
options.description: Select all nets that have a DEF attribute + USE SHIELDNETS
